issues.name: Berserker helm
issues.issue: Listed as itemsNeeded but is actually sold away after quest completion; this is output not input

issues.name: Uncut sapphire
issues.issue: StepText specifies 'cut sapphire' but mapped to uncut (ID 1623); should verify if cutting is part of this step or use cut sapphire ID (1607)

issues.name: Mithril bar
issues.issue: StepText explicitly states '5 mithril bars' but qty is null in mapping; should be qty: 5

issues.name: Bronze nails
issues.issue: Listed as itemsNeeded but only used to craft mithril nails at anvils; is intermediate processing. Consider removing or clarifying as intermediate material

notes: Mapping is mostly accurate with correct quest ID and valid abstractions. Primary issues: berserker helm should not be in itemsNeeded (it's sold back); sapphire type mismatch (uncut vs cut); mithril bar qty missing despite explicit '5 bars' in stepText. Bronze nails is debatable but lower impact. Food option (swordfish/choc bombs) appropriately unresolved. Abstract items (cash stack, melee gear) are genuine.
